titleStmt.title: SII 28.129: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 129. (A.R. No. 284 of 1913.) CHIDAMBARAM, CHIDAMBARAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: Naṭarāja temple, First prākāra, north wall.

Records the royal order conveyed to the officials concerned approving the gift of a total of 1(1/2) vēli, (1/2) kāṇi, one, munirigai and kīḻ of land in three different villages for raising cheṅgaḻunīr flowers and also for securing the maintenance of (ilakkai and koṟṟu) those raising these flowers, for the supply of 200 cheṅgaḻunīr flowers daily, with the balance (of the proceeds of the said lands) after paying the taxes (ūr-māvinda-kaḍamai) and doing kūḍimai, to the tiruppū-maṇḍapam of God Āḷuḍaiyār, as made by Arayaṉ Śrī-Patañjalidēvaṉ alias Ilaṅkēśvaraṉ. The concerned plots were out of the kāṇi of the donor. The order included the permission to have the record inscribed on the walls of Vikkiramachōḻan-tirumāḷikai in the space to be determined by Toṇḍaimāṉ. In continuation was also reinscribed a record of a similar order dated year 34, 52nd day (of the same king ?) in respect of another gift of land, 5 mā (each mā consisting of 500 kuḻis) of cultivated land and one mā of kollai land in Tillaivāḻandaṇanallūr, a hamlet (piḍāgai) of Irājasūriya-chcharuppēdimaṅgalam for arranging the supply of different kinds of flowers to the same God after raising a flower garden named after the same donor as above as Śrī-Patañjali-dēvan. The original inscription on the Vikkiramachōḻan-tirumāḷikai had got worn out (jīṟṇṇkkaiyāl)
The officials and members of the body tiruppū-ttoṇḍargaḷukkunāyakañ-cheyvār named in this record also figure in No. (128) above.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī pon_ tribhuvaṉaccakravattikaḷ maturaiyum Īḻamuṅ karuvūrum pāṇṭiyaṉai muṭittalaiyuṅ koṇṭu virābhiṣekamum vijayābhiṣekamum paṇṇiyaruḷiṉa śrītribhuvaṉaviratevaṟku yāṇṭu muppatoṉpatu nāḷ Irunūṟṟirupattu
nālu toṇṭaimāṉum tiruvaiyyāṟuṭaiyāṉum maturāntaka brahmamārāyaṉum Āḷuṭaiyār koyilukku sāmutāyattirumāḷikaikkūṟu tillai Ampalap pallavaraiyaṉum śrīkāriyañ ceyvārkaḷum koyil nāyakañ ceyvārkaḷum tirumāḷikaik kūṟu cey
vārkaḷum ceyyat tiruvāymoḻintaruḷiṉapaṭi § Āḷuṭaiyārkkuc ceṅkaḻunirt tiruppaḷḷittāmañ cāttukaikkuc ceṅkaḻunir Ākkavum Ākkuvārkku Ilakkaikkum koṟṟukkum Uṭalākavum nittaviṉota vaḷanāṭṭu Āvūrk kūṟṟattuk kiḷiyūruṭaiyāṉ Arayaṉ śrīpatañcali tevaṉāṉa Ilaṅ
keśvaraṉ rājādhirājavaḷanāṭṭu veṇṇaiyūr nāṭṭut taṉkāṇiyāṉa nilattup pañcavaṉ māteviyāṉa kulottuṅkacoḻaccaruppetimaṅkalattup piṭākai cāttamaṅkalamāṉa civacaraṇa cekaranallūrile Araiye nāṉmāvarai muntirikaik kīḻarai nilamum Āyāṉkuṭiyāṉa Āṉantak kūttanallūril niṉṟum ve
ṟu piṟinta civakāmacuntari maṅkalattile Araiye mukkāṇi Araikkāṇi nilamum Innāṭṭu vallattile kāl nilamum Āka Oṉṟaraiye kāṇi Araikkāṇi muntirikaik kiḻarai nilam tiruppūttoṇṭarkaḷukku nāyakañ ceyvārkaḷil kuvaḷaippākkiḻāṉ niṉṟayaṅki Āṭuvāṉāṉa tillai Aḻa
kappiccaṉum tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉāṉa poṉṉampalap piccaṉum cirāḷi tevaṉāṉa Ālālacuntarappiccaṉum Uḷḷiṭṭārkku Ilaṅkeśvaraṉ kuṭukkaiyāle Ivarkaḷ Iṉṉilaṅ kaik koṇṭu Ūrmāvinta kaṭamaiyum Iṟuttuk kuṭimaiyuñ ceytu Iṟaimikuti koṇṭu nāḷ Oṉṟukku Irunūṟu ceṅ
kaḻunirt tiruppaḷḷittāmam nittaṟpaṭi Ākat tiruppūmaṇṭapattukku mutalāka Eṇṇakkaṭavarkaḷākat tiruppūmaṇṭapattukkuk kaṇkāṇi ceyvārkaḷukkut tiṭṭuk kuṭuttārkaḷeṉṟum Ittīṭṭuppaṭiye vikkiramacoḻaṉ tirumāḷikaiyile toṇṭaimāṉ niccayitta Iṭattile kalveṭṭavum Ittiṭṭut tirukkai O
ṭṭiyile Oṭukkavum kaṭavatākap peṟaveṇumeṉṟu tāṉ namakkuc coṉṉamaiyil Ippaṭic ceyyak kaṭavatākac coṉṉom Ippaṭic ceyyap paṇṇuvatu Eḻutiṉāṉ tirumantiraolaineṟiyuṭaic coḻamuventa veḷāṉ Eṉṟum Ippaṭi tiruvāy moḻintaruḷiṉār Ivai toṇṭaimāṉ Eḻuttu Eṉṟum
Ivai viḻiñattaraiyaṉeḻuttu Eṉṟum Ivai vayaṉāṭṭaraiyaṉeḻuttu Eṉṟum Ivai Irācarāca viḻupparaiyaṉeḻuttu Eṉṟum Ivai Aṅkarāyaṉeḻuttu Eṉṟum Ippaṭi prasādañ ceytaruḷi vanta ceyyumpaṭiyum tiṭṭum Iṉṉilattiṟ sātaṉaṅkaḷum tiruk
kai Oṭṭiile Oṭukkittu § Iṉṉamum Ivaṉ ceyvitta rājādhirāja vaḷanāṭṭup poṉmeynta coḻapurattup poṉmeynta perumāḷ tirunantavaṉattukku vaṭakkum ceṇṭu veḷikkut teṟkum naṭuvuṭpaṭṭa Iṭattile Āḷuṭaiyārkku śrīpatañcali tevaṉ Eṉṉum perāl
Oru tirunantavaṉañ ceytu It tirunantavaṉattukku nāluper Āṇṭu Āḷ Oṉṟukku nāḷ Oṉṟukku Aḷakkum viccamoṭṭu nāḻi Uriyum Āḷ Oṉṟukku nāḷ Oṉṟukku Aḷakkum Iruvācci muṉṉāḻiyum Āḷ Iraṇṭukku nāḷ Oṉṟukku Aḷakkum mallikaiyum nantiyāvattam mukkuṟuṇiyum Āḷuṭaiyāṉ
per Iraṇṭaraiyum Āḷavantāṉ per Oṉṟaraiyum Āka Āḷ nālukku nāḷ Oṉṟukku Aḷakkun tiruppaḷḷittāmam mukkuṟuṇi nāṉāḻi Uriyum nāḷtoṟum Aḷakkavum Aḷavātu cikaippaṭṭatuṇṭākil poṉvarkkakoḻuntum peruñ ceṇpakamum veruntāḻaiyum Uḷḷiṭṭaṉa
Iṭṭuc celavākkāte Aḷakka niccayitta vaṟkattile tiruppūmaṇṭapattukku mutalāka Aḷantu celavākka kaṭavatākavum Ivarkaḷukku Ilakkaikkum koṟṟukkum per Oṉṟukku nāḷ Oṉṟukkuk kuṟuṇi nāṉāḻi Ākavanta nellukku Iṉṉāṭṭu Irācacūriyaccaruppeti maṅkalattup piṭākai
tillaivāḻantaṇanallūril viḷainilattile Aiññūṟu kuḻi koṇṭatu Oru māvāka Aiñcu mā nilamuṅ kollai nilattile Araimā nilamum vilaikoṇṭa Iṉṉilattu Iṟaimikutiyāl Uḷḷa nellup peṟak kaṭavarkaḷāka Iṉṉilam Ivarkaḷukku viṭṭāṉeṉṟumippaṭi
muppattu nālāvatu nāḷ Aimpattiraṇṭiṉāl prasādañ ceytaruḷi vanta ceyyumpaṭippaṭi vikkiramacoḻaṉ tirumāḷikaiiṟ kalveṭṭiṉaitu jirṇṇikkaiyāl Ippaṭiyum kalveṭṭiyatu ḥ §
Digital edition of SII 28.129 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
